title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 17 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 17 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 17 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 17/01/2024
The iron ore future price continued to shake down today, the main contract I2405 closed at 925, down 1.33%throughout the day. Iron ore spot price in the morning rose slightly 2-3 yuan/mt or so, but the inquiry was relatively less. Some steel mills continued the rhythm of just needing to purchase, the actual transaction is limited throughout the day, and the trading sentiment was weak.
